tools.name: smartagent_catalog_list_plans
tools.description: List published SmartAgentAPIs plans, currencies, included modules, and quotas.

tools.name: smartagent_discovery_capabilities
tools.description: Return /v1/agent/capabilities with route-family metadata, MCP parity hints, and runnable example references.

tools.name: smartagent_context_get
tools.description: Return public structured agent context for a supported launch city or region alias.

tools.name: smartagent_places_search
tools.description: Search /v1/places/search for legally reviewed place records by region, query, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_places_nearby
tools.description: Find nearby legally reviewed places from a caller-supplied coordinate.

tools.name: smartagent_place_agent_context_get
tools.description: Call /v1/places/{place_id}/agent-context to fetch SmartAPIs agent-oriented summary fields for one place record.

tools.name: smartagent_products_search
tools.description: Search /v1/products/search for legally reviewed product references by region, query, brand, GTIN, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_regulatory_licenses_search
tools.description: Search /v1/regulatory/licenses/search for legally reviewed public licensing records by region, query, status, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_regulatory_inspections_search
tools.description: Search /v1/regulatory/inspections/search for legally reviewed public inspection summaries by region, query, status, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_regulatory_permits_search
tools.description: Search /v1/regulatory/permits/search for legally reviewed public permit summaries by region, query, status, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_regulatory_facility_get
tools.description: Call /v1/regulatory/facilities/{facility_id} to retrieve one regulated facility or business anchor.

tools.name: smartagent_workflows_regulatory_site_brief_get
tools.description: Call /v1/workflows/regulatory-site-brief/{facility_id} for a cross-family response that combines regulatory, transit, and environment context.

tools.name: smartagent_transit_routes_search
tools.description: Search /v1/transit/routes for legally reviewed transit route records by region, query, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_environment_alerts_search
tools.description: Search /v1/environment/alerts for legally reviewed environment alert references by region, query, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_civic_service_points_search
tools.description: Search /v1/civic/service-points for privacy-reviewed civic service points by region, query, and limit.

tools.name: smartagent_billing_create_checkout_session
tools.description: Create a Stripe checkout session for a plan purchase using an admin key.

tools.name: smartagent_access_issue_client_key
tools.description: Issue a client-scoped API key for downstream agent or application access using an admin key.

tools.name: smartagent_access_activate_developer_free
tools.description: Activate the free developer plan when no paid or trialing plan is active.

tools.name: smartagent_dashboard_summary
tools.description: Return the browser-dashboard payload for organization, subscription, usage, entitlements, keys, and recent audit events.

tools.name: smartagent_billing_create_portal_session
tools.description: Create a Stripe Customer Portal session for subscription management using an admin key.

tools.name: smartagent_usage_summary
tools.description: Return the current-period usage and quota summary using an admin key.
